description: A diver spent a weekend doing shore dives at Sund Rock in the Hood Canal (a saltwater fjord) in December 2010. However, their dive computer recorded the water type as 'Fresh Water'. Correct the logbook by changing the water type to 'Salt' for only the dives in the December 2010 trip (Sund Rock). Save the updated dive log to ~/Documents/dives.ssrf.
